title: Feature Request: Putty disconnect visibility / behaviour
author: bitboy85
body_snippet:
When putty disconnects you get the notification popup, but no visual feedback which tab is affected if you have multiple conncetions open.

Wish: Change icon when disconnected to something like 🚫 or add **(inactive)** to the tab title like putty does.

Reconnect behaviour
keep tab on the same place and don't move it to the end when doing a reconnect.

iterations.description: Issue body is empty and carries only a legacy 1.77.4 label with no reproducible steps, expected vs actual behavior, or details about what PuTTY disconnect visibility/behavior change is requested.
Wontfix: PuTTY disconnect detection requires monitoring external process state — unreliable with embedded PuTTY

notes: Feature: PuTTY disconnect visual indicator + tab position on reconnect. UX enhancement, low priority.
